tool.name: EnzyWizard Mut Integrate
tool.description: Integrate wild-type and mutant EnzyWizard JSON report directories

expand.name: wt_input_zip
expand.label: Wild-type report directory (zip)
expand.help: Zip archive containing wild-type JSON reports.

expand.name: mut_input_zip
expand.label: Mutant report directory (zip)
expand.help: Zip archive containing mutant JSON reports.

tool.help: Integrate wild-type and mutant EnzyWizard JSON report directories. Directory inputs are represented as zip datasets and unpacked explicitly inside this wrapper command in the Galaxy job working directory. The mutation-clean report is passed as a separate input and is not copied into the wild-type report directory, because the upstream tool validates the number of report JSON files in each directory. Outputs are exposed as discovered dataset collections.
